title: [MTR] French Coral Car
description: That's an addon for MTR with the French Coral car
body:
# This addon adds multiple French Corail coach liveries
for **Minecraft Transit Railway** (MTR), available in **both compartment** and **open (saloon)** configurations.

## The pack includes several iconic and regional designs:

- Carmillon livery, representing modern SNCF intercity branding
- Green/Orange livery, inspired by classic Corail-era colors
- OUIGO livery, based on the low-cost high-speed brand style
- Bourgogne livery, reflecting regional TER identity
- Cinema livery, a special themed variant
-Centre Val De Loire livery, another regional livery
-Grand Est livery, with the Fluo and the old version
- Aura (Lyon) livery, the rgional livery of the Auvergne Rhône Alpes
- B6 dux version, the back control cabin

Each livery is available for both compartment coaches and open coaches, allowing flexible train compositions for different use cases, from long-distance services to regional operations.

The **V2** as added the Class system, all the version with 2 class have the 1st class and the 2nd class

This addon focuses on visual customization only and does not add new mechanics, ensuring full compatibility with existing MTR systems.

## Requirements:
Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR), and a compatible mod loader (Fabric if required).

## **A BIG REFESH OF THE PACK IS COMMING FOR THE V3 :**
I'm going to separate some of the corail in differents little RS to optimize the file size. So all the corail are going to be in a big collection. with little themed RS (Special edition, 200km/h edition, regional edition, old edition ...). So prepare you'r world for a big refresh !

## supply for add the b6: (the v2 didn't need this tutorial)
1. go to the file section
2. download the last version od the b6dux files
3. add to you'r ressources pack folder
4. have fun !
